author: Jill Tuffnell
title: Club long weekend trip to Sheringham, Norfolk, Friday 5th to Monday 8th March,2027 (3 nights)
content: The Club has booked self-catering accommodation in Sheringham on the north Norfolk Coast for a long weekend at the beginning of March 2027. There is excellent coastal walking as well as inland paths to Sheringham Park and Felbrigg Hall. We will offer walks on all four days - but need volunteers to lead B walks on both Saturday and Sunday. The regular coast bus makes it easy to offer linear walks. For those choosing to share a room the cost is £150 per person. Sole occupancy of a room costs £175. If you would like to book, please transfer a deposit of £50 to Jill - if you don't have her email, contact secretary@cambridgeramblingclub.com .
